➕ Add a Student Account

✅ Student account created!

After adding a student, click 🔗 Setup Link next to their name. Share that link with the student — they click it once on their own device and their account is set up automatically. After that, they just visit the site and type their username and password.

👥 Student Accounts (0)

📲 How to give students access on their own device: After adding a student, click the 🔗 Setup Link button next to their name. Copy the link and share it in Google Classroom, email, or anywhere. Students click it once → account sets up automatically → they log in normally from then on.

📊 Student Progress

Click a student's name to see their full lesson-by-lesson breakdown across all 9 units.

📄 View Student Work

Select a student to view all their saved answers, organized by unit and lesson. You can also see their submitted assignment files below.

📋 View a Submitted File

Students click "Submit Assignment" to download a file. If they share it with you, paste the contents here to view it formatted.

📖 Teacher Guide

Lesson narratives, learning goals, launch notes, and activity synthesis from your teacher PDFs. Click any lesson to expand.

🔑 Teacher Accounts

Add co-teachers or change teacher credentials. All teacher accounts have full admin access.

✅ Teacher account added!

⚙️ Danger Zone

Permanently deletes ALL student and teacher accounts and resets to the default teacher login. Use only if completely locked out.
